title: Duxo's More Mob Drops
description: Adds drops to some of the mobs that don't drop anything! Intended to be Vanilla+
body:
Adds loot tables for mobs that currently don't drop anything! Made for Vanilla+ Play Throughs and currently has only been tested on 1.21.11+ (should work for older versions!)

Current custom Loot Tables:

Allay
```
Rolls: 3
100/200 - Nothing
99/200 - Amethyst Shard
1/200 - Diamond
```

Bee
```
Rolls: 5
1/4 Pumpkin Seed
1/4 Beetroot Seed
1/4 Melon Seed
1/4 Wheat Seed
```

Camel
```
Rolls: 5
1/2 Nothing
1/2 Sand
```

Endermite
```
Rolls: 3
1/2 Ender Pearl
1/2 Nothing
```

Fox
```
Rolls: 5
1/2 Sweet Berries
1/2 Nothing
```

Silverfish
```
Rolls: 5
10/21 Iron Nugget
1/21 Iron Ingot
10/21 Nothing
```

Villager
```
Rolls: 5
10/21 Emerald
1/21 Block of Emerald
10/21 Nothing
```
